pi_items.source: task.json description line 2: 'You are an IT security analyst conducting a quarterly user access review'

pi_items.verified_value: Not explicitly stated in task or setup files
pi_items.source: Task involves access control auditing and Nuxeo DMS, typically IT-focused, but no explicit industry declaration found
setup_task.sh uses Document.AddACE and Document.RemoveACL for ACL operations; creates iam-auditors group; deletes/creates comments; verifier.py checks for CSV file upload

setup_task.sh line 86 creates user 'dpatel'; policy document in HTML (line 130-132) explicitly states 'User dpatel (Deepak Patel, Engineering, departed September 30, 2025)'; verifier.py line 123 checks for dpatel removal

setup_task.sh lines 127-141 create a Note document titled 'Access Review Policy' in Templates workspace; policy contains policy ID 'IAM-QAR-2025-Q4' and defines permission requirements and remediation tasks

privileged_info_summary: The task is a quarterly access control audit in a Nuxeo document management system where an IT security analyst must revoke access for departed employee dpatel (who has ReadWrite permission on Templates workspace) and downgrade contractor lnovak's overly broad Everything permission on Projects to ReadWrite. The analyst must create an 'iam-auditors' security group with Read access to both workspaces, add audit trail comments documenting the changes per policy IAM-QAR-2025-Q4, and upload an access review report from the Desktop to Templates. All data including users, workspaces, and audit policy are synthetically generated by the task setup script.
